🧭 conductor: design a local-first notes app — write the PRD, then scaffold it
🧭 I'll have tech-writer draft the PRD, then coder scaffold it.
→ tech-writer ← PRD for a local-first notes app (offline, on-device model)
· [tech-writer] ✎ following house template — Golden Test Cases, Local Model Reqs
→ coder ← scaffold the app from output/notes-app-prd.md
✓ coder → Scaffolded notes/ — app.py, storage.py, tests green.
Done. PRD at output/notes-app-prd.md (incl. Golden Test Cases &
Local Model Requirements), plus a working scaffold in notes/ with passing tests.
